scripts.build: npm run css && npm run alpine && npm run htmx && npm run htmx-sse && npm run basecoat && npm run challenge
scripts.challenge: npm run challenge:blobs && npm run challenge:solve
scripts.challenge:blobs: javascript-obfuscator ./assets/security/challenge-blobs.js --output ./assets/security/challenge-blobs.min.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --dead-code-injection false --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64
scripts.challenge:solve: javascript-obfuscator ./assets/security/challenge-solve.js --output ./assets/security/challenge-solve.min.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --dead-code-injection false --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64
